title: capsella bursa-pastoris coronopus
intro: Capsella bursa-pastoris coronopus, also known as shepherd's purse, is a flowering annual plant that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stop bleeding, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant to relieve coughs. The health benefits of shepherd's purse include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and provide antioxidant properties, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, shepherd's purse is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from colds and coughs to digestive problems and menstrual cramps.
